title: Denby - Imperial Blue Rice Bowls Set of 4 - Dishwasher Microwave Safe Crockery 480ml 13cm - Royal Blue Ceramic Stoneware Tableware - Chip & Crack Resistant Soup Bowls
features: SET OF 4 RICE BOWLS: This set contains 4 blue rice bowls (13cm diameter, 480ml capacity) - These rice bowls are multi-functional and can be used in a number of ways; for creating impact when serving global foods, informal tapas occasions or BBQs

HAND-CRAFTED IN ENGLAND: Hand-Crafted in the Denby Pottery in England from locally-sourced, high quality clay - Each item is touched by at least 20 pairs of hands during the making process in our 200 year old factory in Derbyshire

DURABLE & VERSATILE STONEWARE: This set has been expertly glazed to prevent chipping and enhance durability - Our ranges are versatile and multi-functional - perfect for everyday use or for special occasions - so a smaller number of pieces are needed

OVEN, MICROWAVE, DISHWASHER & FREEZER SAFE: Each item can be safely used in the oven, dishwasher, freezer and microwave meaning you can cook your food in the pot you serve it in, save the leftovers and reheat it the next day, saving you time and money
VIBRANT GLAZE: The Denby Imperial Blue range was introduced in 1989 and displays a vibrant cobalt glaze with hints of pure white - This stoneware range is timeless

BUY WELL, BUY ONCE: Denby products are sustainably made - we are proudly the first UK tableware manufacturer to be able to claim ‘zero to landfill’ for all our process waste - We also offer a 10 year guarantee on our Made in England stoneware ranges
description: From the manufacturer Imperial Blue Collection Denby Imperial Blue is one of our most popular ranges. Featuring a rich blue glaze this collection is perfect for making an impression in any home. Handcrafted and hand-decorated at our pottery in Derbyshire, every ceramic piece is made to last. With a wide range of versatile items to choose from, including plates, bowls and mugs in various shapes and sizes, you can build a stunning Imperial Blue dinner set. The design also mixes perfectly with pieces from the Denby Blue Haze collection. Denby Imperial Blue stoneware is practical and durable enough for everyday use while stunning enough for best. It's covered by our 10-year promise and is suitable for use in the microwave, oven, freezer and dishwasher. These are just some of the factors making it a conscious choice for your home. Expertly glazed for enhanced durability Each piece crafted by Denby is tough enough for everyday and stunning enough for best. Our stoneware products are expertly glazed making them dishwasher safe and suitable for microwave and freezer use for cooking, reheating and storing food. Practical and durable style which is made to last Denby is known for its durability, something which is becoming more important than ever as we look to reduce disposable purchases. All of our stoneware ranges come with a 10 year promise and are hand-crafted in Derbyshire using locally sourced clay. As our stoneware is extremely strong you can use it confidently for all occasions. Practical and durable for everyday use The Denby Imperial Blue dinnerware collection is perfect for any occasion; everyday family dinners, barbecues or celebrations. With a wide range of different sized plates, bowls and drinkware we have the perfect serving piece for any dish. Inspired design The Imperial Blue collection is not only stylish but also timeless. The colour of the stunning glaze creates a truly enduring collection that stands the test of time. This design features a rich blue with many of the items featured with a pristine white glaze, creating a simple yet beautiful look. Sustainably made, designed to last Sustainably made, designed to last At Denby caring for the environment and our planet is very important to us. We are proudly the first UK tableware manufacturer to be able to claim ‘zero to landfill’ for all our process waste. Due to this our stunning and versatile collections remain the tableware of choice for the conscious shopper, as they have been for over 200 years. 20 pairs of hands with traditional techniques Each piece of our stoneware dinnerware is handcrafted in Derbyshire by our super-talented and passionate craftspeople using well-preserved traditional pottery techniques which have been passed down over generations. Each item passes through at least 20 pairs of hands before arriving at your home to be used and enjoyed.
